header._comment: NOTE: All json keys are case-sensitive, including GUIDs.

endpointA.name: Default App Loopback (A)
endpointA.description: Default MIDI 2.0 loopback endpoint for use by applications. This is the A-side of the loopback pair.

endpointB.name: Default App Loopback (B)
endpointB.description: Default MIDI 2.0 loopback endpoint for use by applications. This is the B-side of the loopback pair.

endpoint.name: Default Basic App Loopback
endpoint.description: Default MIDI 1.0 loopback endpoint for use by applications.
